text.title: Meta Ads Campaign Setup Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion SaaS Q2 launch on Meta. Conversion event: SignUp. Forecast 90 conv/wk → CBO. Three ad sets: cold matched-LAL, retargeting site visitors, retargeting cart abandoners.
example.note: CBO justified (forecast ≥50 conv/wk), 3 ad sets ≤5 cap, every name conforms to convention.
